mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(approved_at, '%Y-%m') AS month FROM card_transaction WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY month ASC
SELECT month, total_expense FROM monthreport WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND STR_TO_DATE(month, '%Y-%m') < STR_TO_DATE(#{currentMonth}, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY STR_TO_DATE(month, '%Y-%m') DESC LIMIT 6
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthreport ( user_id, month, total_expense, total_saving, saving_rate, compare_expense, compare_saving, category_chart, six_month_chart, feedback, next_goal ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{month}, #{totalExpense}, #{totalSaving}, #{savingRate}, #{compareExpense}, #{compareSaving}, #{categoryChart}, #{sixMonthChart}, #{feedback}, #{nextGoal} )
mapper.select: SELECT month, total_expense FROM monthreport WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND STR_TO_DATE(month, '%Y-%m') <= STR_TO_DATE(#{currentMonth}, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY STR_TO_DATE(month, '%Y-%m') DESC LIMIT 6
